title: Alignment with Institutional Technology Transfer Goals

options.title: Strongly Aligned – directly supports institutional transfer strategy
Moderately Aligned – supports goals indirectly
Minimally Aligned – limited relevance
Not Aligned – unrelated to institutional objectives
High – novel technology with strong market demand
Moderate – some innovation with fair market interest
Low – incremental improvement with limited market
None – lacks innovation or market potential
IP secured or in advanced filing stage
IP under preparation or review
IP not yet developed
Highly feasible – clear roadmap and strong partners
Moderately feasible – partial readiness or limited partners
Low feasibility – unclear implementation plan
High – significant positive economic or social outcomes
Moderate – some benefits with limited scope
Low – minimal measurable benefits
High – can be scaled and maintained long-term
Moderate – scalable with additional support
Low – limited scalability or short-term only
